TÜBİTAK Support to Assoc. Prof. Dr. Özgür Orhangazi

The project, led by Prof. Dr. Özgür Orhangazi, one of the faculty members of the Department of Economics, Faculty of Economics, Administrative and Social Sciences, Kadir Has University, was awarded project support under the TÜBİTAK 1002- Rapid Support Program.

In the project titled “Financing Constraints and Export Decisions in the Turkish Manufacturing Industry”, the relationship between financing constraints and exports will be analyzed using annual data of Turkish manufacturing firms for the period 1996-2013.
